WebSocket</h1>\n  <p>本服务默认 <code>ws://127.0.0.1:8002/ws</code>（与当前页同源则自动拼接）。</p>\n  <p>\n    <input id=\"msg\" type=\"text\" value=\"hello\" />\n    <button type=\"button\" id=\"send\">发送</button>\n  </p>\n  <div id=\"log\"></div>\n  <script>\n    const log = (s) => {\n      const el = document.getElementById(\"log\");\n      el.textContent += s + \"\\n\";\n    };\n    const proto = location.protocol === \"https:\" ? \"wss:\" : \"ws:\";\n    const ws = new WebSocket(proto + \"//\" + location.host + \"/ws\");\n    ws.onopen = () => log(\"[open]\");\n    ws.onmessage = (e) => log(\"[message] \" + e.data);\n    ws.onerror = () => log(\"[error]\");\n    ws.onclose = () => log(\"[close]\");\n    document.getElementById(\"send\").onclick = () => {\n      const t = document.getElementById(\"msg\").value;\n      if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) ws.send(t);\n      else log(\"未连接，无法发送\");\n    };\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",

          codeText: "\"\"\"长轮询：请求挂起直到有数据或超时。运行:\n  uvicorn app:app --app-dir 05_long_polling --reload --port 8005\n\"\"\"\nimport asyncio\nimport sys\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles\n\n_REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\nif str(_REPO) not in sys.path:\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(_REPO))\nfrom common.flow_log import flow_recv, flow_send\n\napp = FastAPI(title=\"05 Long Polling\")\nBASE = Path(__file__).resolve().parent\n\n# 模拟：每 8 秒产生一次“新数据”\n_seq = 0\n_last_emit = time.monotonic()\n\n\nasync def wait_until_data_ready(since: int, max_wait: float = 25.0):\n    global _seq, _last_emit\n    deadline = time.monotonic() + max_wait\n    while time.monotonic() < deadline:\n        # 每 8 秒 bump 一次版本\n        if time.monotonic() - _last_emit >= 8:\n            _seq += 1\n            _last_emit = time.monotonic()\n        if _seq > since:\n            return _seq\n        await asyncio.sleep(0.3)\n    return since\n\n\n@app.get(\"/poll\")\nasync def poll(since: int = 0):\n    flow_recv(\"05_long_polling\", \"GET /poll（长连接等待中）\", {\"since\": since})\n    new_seq = await wait_until_data_ready(since)\n    if new_seq > since:\n        body = {\"seq\": new_seq, \"msg\": \"new data\"}\n    else:\n        body = {\"seq\": since, \"msg\": \"timeout, no new data\"}\n    flow_send(\"05_long_polling\", \"200 application/json（长轮询返回）\", body)\n    return body\n\n\napp.mount(\"/\", StaticFiles(directory=BASE / \"static\", html=True), name=\"static\")\n",

            codeText: "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\" />\n  <title>05 长轮询</title>\n  <style>\n    body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 640px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }\n    pre { background: #111; color: #0f0; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; white-space: pre-wrap; }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <h1>5. 长轮询（Long Polling）</h1>\n  <p>每次请求带 <code>since=&lt;上次 seq&gt;</code>，服务器在约 8 秒内出现新 seq 时立即返回，否则最长等待约 25 秒后返回。</p>\n  <pre id=\"out\"></pre>\n  <script>\n    const out = document.getElementById(\"out\");\n    let since = 0;\n    async function loop() {\n      out.textContent += \"请求 poll?since=\" + since + \" ...\\n\";\n      const res = await fetch(\"/poll?since=\" + since);\n      const j = await res.json();\n      since = j.seq;\n      out.textContent += JSON.stringify(j) + \" @ \" + new Date().toISOString() + \"\\n\\n\";\n      loop();\n    }\n    loop();\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",

          codeText: "\"\"\"gRPC 为进程间/服务间 RPC；此处 FastAPI 只托管说明页。运行:\n  uvicorn app:app --app-dir 07_grpc --reload --port 8007\n\"\"\"\nimport sys\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles\nfrom starlette.requests import Request\n\n_REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\nif str(_REPO) not in sys.path:\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(_REPO))\nfrom common.flow_log import flow_recv, flow_send\n\napp = FastAPI(title=\"07 gRPC (static + notes)\")\nBASE = Path(__file__).resolve().parent\n\n\n@app.middleware(\"http\")\nasync def note_static_only(request: Request, call_next):\n    if request.method == \"GET\" and request.url.path in (\"/\", \"/index.html\"):\n        flow_recv(\n            \"07_grpc(HTTP)\",\n            f\"{request.method} {request.url.path}\",\n            \"仅静态说明页；二进制 gRPC 请看运行 grpc_server 的终端\",\n        )\n    response = await call_next(request)\n    if request.method == \"GET\" and request.url.path in (\"/\", \"/index.html\"):\n        flow_send(\"07_grpc(HTTP)\", f\"HTTP {response.status_code}\", \"返回 HTML\")\n    return response\n\n\napp.mount(\"/\", StaticFiles(directory=BASE / \"static\", html=True), name=\"static\")\n",

    }), "\n", _jsx(MermaidPanel, {

      }), "。"]
    }), "\n", _jsx(MermaidPanel, {

    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.h2, {

      }), "进入新文档。"]
    }), "\n", _jsx(MermaidPanel, {
      source: "sequenceDiagram\n    autonumber\n    participant B as 浏览器\n    participant S as FastAPI\n\n    B->>S: POST /submit<br/>Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded<br/>body: username=...\n    Note over S: Form(...) 解析字段\n    S-->>B: 200 text/html（结果页）\n    Note over B: 地址栏可能变为 /submit；页面刷新/导航"
    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.pre, {

      })
    })]
  });
}
function MDXContent(props = {}) {
  const {wrapper: MDXLayout} = {
    ..._provideComponents(),
    ...props.components
  };
  return MDXLayout ? _jsx(MDXLayout, {
    ...props,
    children: _jsx(_createMdxContent, {
      ...props
    })
  }) : _createMdxContent(props);
}
return {
  default: MDXContent
};
function _missingMdxReference(id, component) {
  throw new Error("Expected " + (component ? "component" : "object") + " `" + id + "` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.");
}
